# Contributing

## AI assistant configuration (agnostic-ai)

This repo defines its AI agents, skills, and instructions **once** under
`.agnostic-ai/`, then transpiles them into each tool's native format with
[agnostic-ai](https://github.com/Chemaclass/agnostic-ai). Today we ship two
targets: **Claude Code** (`.claude/`, root `CLAUDE.md`) and **Codex**
(`.codex/`, root `AGENTS.md`).

### Source of truth vs generated files

| Path | Status | Edit it? |
|---|---|---|
| `.agnostic-ai/` | source of truth (tracked) | **yes** |
| `agnostic-ai.yaml` | config: sources + targets (tracked) | yes |
| `.claude/`, `.codex/`, `CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md` | generated (git-ignored) | **no** |

The generated files are git-ignored via a managed block in `.gitignore`. Never
edit them by hand. Every generated file carries a `Generated by agnostic-ai`
header. Edit the spec under `.agnostic-ai/` and re-run sync instead.

### One-time setup

```bash
brew install --cask Chemaclass/tap/agnostic-ai
# or: go install github.com/chemaclass/agnostic-ai/cmd/agnostic-ai@latest
```

After cloning, generate your local AI config (these files are not committed):

```bash
agnostic-ai sync
```

### Workflow

```bash
# 1. Edit a spec under .agnostic-ai/ (agents, skills, or AGNOSTIC_AI.md)
# 2. Regenerate every target
agnostic-ai sync

# 3. Confirm specs and generated output agree (CI gate)
agnostic-ai sync --check
```

| Command | Use |
|---|---|
| `agnostic-ai sync` | Regenerate `.claude/`, `.codex/`, `CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md` |
| `agnostic-ai sync --check` | Fail if generated output drifts from specs (run in CI) |
| `agnostic-ai status` | Show targets, spec count, drift |
| `agnostic-ai list` | List loaded specs |
| `agnostic-ai doctor` | Diagnose config, CLIs, specs, drift |

### Adding a target

Append it to `targets:` in `agnostic-ai.yaml`, run `agnostic-ai sync`, and add
the new generated path to the managed `.gitignore` block with
`agnostic-ai sync --gitignore on`.

## Site contributions

See the [README](./README.md) for the build, blog post, and Führungen
workflows. `zola build` must pass before committing. Use
[conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
